title: Frieren Staff
description: This texture pack replaces the totem of immortality with the staff of Frieren from the anime 'Sousou no Frieren'.
body:
#                                       Frieren Staff
Need:

[OptiFine ](https://optifine.net/home)

[CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)

- This texture pack replaces the totem of immortality with the staff of Frieren from the anime 'Sousou no Frieren'
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b975e67344db000f8897765796d46e6d6760f192.png)

## Totem
- Frieren

## 
## I recommend using this mod ([RP Renames](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames/version/buwTLACR))
- Shows every CIT and CEM rename in extra anvil menu for better usage of resource packs with renames
  ![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b42d4d31dd616597869cc9b1d0dfec4294e82245.png)

## P.S
This is my first texture pack that I posted somewhere :3
